channel.title: kafka on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in kafka on Frank Huang

item.title: Different parameters meaning in Kafka
item.description: key.serializer and value.serializer: decide what algo for serialization. buffer.memory: the the size of memory size that producer could buffer before sending to consumer. batch.size: the size one single batch that each request could carry. linger.ms: after how many ms, no matter the batch is full, send it regardlessly. max.request.size: the size of data that each request could carry. acks: persistent strategy. Each leader inside different partitions will keep track of a list called In-sync Replicas to keep track of the followers that are syncing with leader.
